sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n115657" key="yhfiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ψηφισ-τέον</orth>, <sense id="n115657.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must calculate,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:33:31" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">33.31</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
